category.scope_note: Perovskite and tandem photovoltaic module comparison.

title.en: China-to-US Perovskite PV Module Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国钙钛矿光伏组件进入美国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鈣鈦礦光伏組件進入美國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China perovskite and tandem PV module documentation against US UL, fire classification, environmental, lead-leaching, and installation expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国钙钛矿与叠层光伏组件文件与美国 UL、防火等级、环境、铅浸出和安装要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鈣鈦礦與疊層光伏組件文件與美國 UL、防火等級、環境、鉛浸出和安裝要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NRTL assessment, environmental compliance determination, customs determination, utility approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current US federal, state, listing, fire, electrical, environmental, and installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NRTL 评审、环境合规裁定、海关裁定、电力公司批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行美国联邦、州、列名、防火、电气、环境及安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NRTL 評審、環境合規裁定、海關裁定、電力公司批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行美國聯邦、州、列名、防火、電氣、環境及安裝要求。

answer_first.en: UL 61730 listing, fire classification, and lead-leaching scrutiny such as EPA TCLP are the major gaps for perovskite modules.
answer_first.zh: UL 61730 列名、防火等级，以及 EPA TCLP 等铅浸出审查，是钙钛矿组件的主要差距。
answer_first.zht: UL 61730 列名、防火等級，以及 EPA TCLP 等鉛浸出審查，是鈣鈦礦組件的主要差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, NRTL, utility, customs, environmental authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
